name_en: M61695 Grey Monogram Eclipse! Chip Edition, MUL TIPLE This Louis Vuitton HHI! series wallet features a stylish and understated design. Grey Monogram Eclipse leather short wallet, convenient for storing bills, credit cards, and receipts. Lightweight and durable, it easily fits into a jacket or pant pocket. Size: 12/9cm.
